verdict: The chart is unplayable on pad due to physically impossible hold-jumps and sudden triple-note hand chords.
dynamics: The overall density tracks the song's energy well (rho = 0.781), though it drops to near-zero inappropriately in bars 67-69.

issues.problem: Holding L while tapping D+U is physically impossible without using hands, as D+U cannot be bracketed with one foot.
Holding L while tapping D+U is an impossible 3-way pad technique.
Triple-note jump (D+L+R) introduces hands without warning on a standard singles chart.
Rapid 8th-note jumps transitioning from L+R to U+D to L+R are extremely jarring and highly uncomfortable to execute.
